name: Android Camera Bridge
description: Android-only OpenClaw camera bridge that wraps the CLI helper, stages fresh captures into the default agent workspace, and optionally returns a vision summary.

defaultNode.description: Default paired Android node name or id.

tempSubdir.description: Temp subdirectory under the OS temp root where OpenClaw camera helper files land.

workspaceImagesDir.description: Workspace-relative folder where staged captures are copied.

openclawBin.description: Optional explicit path to the OpenClaw CLI binary. If omitted, the plugin tries the OpenClaw CLI on PATH.

defaultAnalyze.description: Whether the tool should run image analysis on the staged image by default.

defaultMaxWidth.description: Optional default max-width passed to the camera helper.

defaultQuality.description: Optional default JPEG quality passed to the camera helper.

defaultDelayMs.description: Optional default delay passed to the camera helper before capture.

latestFileName.description: Base file name to keep updated with the most recent capture for the chosen facing.

ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the local Ollama API.

ollamaModel.description: Ollama vision-capable model to use for local image analysis.

ollamaPrompt.description: Default prompt for local Ollama image analysis.
